flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY Old Westbury rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.3k → $5.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY Old Westbury fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (30.9% → 26.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY Old Westbury fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at SUNY Old Westbury rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (33.2% → 37.0%).
